sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on GL >= FromGL and GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (MapKey like 'M2-3-5-A-%-1' or MapKey like 'M2-3-5-A-%-2')
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex1 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = MapKey from TransX inner join MapKeyRanges on Co >= FromGL and Co <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and MapKey like 'C2-%'
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex3 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Ledger = 'IFRS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF'
update TransX set Ledger = 'GAAP' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG'
update TransX set Ledger = 'STAT' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt2-Amt3,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger,Flex1,Flex2,GL,GLdesc,Flex3,Flex4,Co,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID, Ledger,Flex1,Flex2,GL,GLdesc,'C2' as Flex3,'Odyssey Re Holding Corp.' as Flex4,'all' as Co,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1,round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Ledger,Flex1,Flex2,GL,GLdesc)
update TransX set Flex5 = substring(GL,7,1), Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'A' from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,5) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'Tax GL' and m.Descr = '9999999'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr, Ledger, Co, GL, Amt2,Amt3,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],
